site.name: Calc Empire
site.tagline: Free online calculators that show the math.
site.author: Roma

calculators.title: Mortgage Recast Calculator
calculators.description: See your new monthly payment after a lump-sum recast. Amortization schedule, interest saved.

calculators.title: No-Vig Calculator
calculators.description: Strip the sportsbook vig from any odds line to find the fair implied probability.

calculators.title: Dividend Calculator
calculators.description: Project dividend income with or without DRIP. Year-by-year compounding, total return shown.

calculators.title: Variance Calculator
calculators.description: Sample and population variance from a data set, plus mean and standard deviation.

calculators.title: Asphalt Calculator
calculators.description: Tons of hot-mix asphalt needed for a driveway or lot, with density and depth controls.

calculators.title: Mixed Number Calculator
calculators.description: Add, subtract, multiply, divide mixed numbers and improper fractions. Reduced result shown.

calculators.title: Paycheck Calculator
calculators.description: Take-home pay after federal, FICA, state, and pre-tax. 50-state pages linked.

calculators.title: A1C Calculator
calculators.description: Convert A1C to estimated average glucose (eAG) in mg/dL or mmol/L. ADA-endorsed formula.

calculators.title: Creatinine Clearance Calculator
calculators.description: Cockcroft-Gault for drug dosing or CKD-EPI 2021 for kidney-function staging. KDIGO band.

calculators.title: Options Profit Calculator
calculators.description: Long/short call & put P&L at expiration. Native payoff chart, breakeven, max profit/loss.

calculators.title: Chronological Age Calculator
calculators.description: Exact age in years, months, days, hours from any date of birth to today.

calculators.title: Weighted Grade Calculator
calculators.description: Final course grade from weighted categories. Target-grade calculator for the last assignment.

calculators.title: Money Market Calculator
calculators.description: Project money-market balance with APY, monthly contribution, daily compounding.

calculators.title: Square Footage Calculator
calculators.description: Sq ft of a room from length × width in feet, inches, or meters. Multi-room totals.

calculators.title: Standard Deviation Calculator
calculators.description: Sample and population standard deviation, variance, and mean from a list of numbers.

calculators.title: Dog Age Calculator
calculators.description: Dog years to human years via the 2019 epigenetic-clock formula. Compares to classic 7× rule.

calculators.title: Median Calculator
calculators.description: Median, quartiles (Q1, Q3), and IQR of any number set. Sorted view shown.

calculators.title: Steps to Miles Calculator
calculators.description: Steps to miles using height-based stride length. Or work backwards from a mile goal.

calculators.title: Average Calculator
calculators.description: Mean, median, and mode of any list of numbers. Knows when to use each.

calculators.title: Fractions Calculator
calculators.description: Add, subtract, multiply, divide two fractions. Reduced + mixed-number form, step by step.

calculators.title: Height Calculator
calculators.description: Predict a child's adult height with the mid-parental method. Inch and centimeter support.

calculators.title: Quadratic Formula Calculator
calculators.description: Solve ax² + bx + c = 0. Real or complex roots, discriminant, and vertex of the parabola.

calculators.title: Rounding Calculator
calculators.description: Round to any decimal place — nearest, up, down, or banker's (round-half-to-even).

calculators.title: Cumulative GPA Calculator
calculators.description: Roll up semester GPAs by credit hours. Plus the GPA you need next term to hit a target.

calculators.title: Decimal to Fraction Converter
calculators.description: Convert decimals to reduced fractions and back. Handles repeating decimals.

calculators.title: Tip Calculator
calculators.description: Split a restaurant bill, calculate gratuity, US tip norms built in. Tax-inclusive toggle.

calculators.title: Slope Calculator
calculators.description: Slope from two points, y-intercept, and the line equation y = mx + b.

calculators.title: Max Heart Rate Calculator
calculators.description: Max HR via Fox, Tanaka, or Gulati. Five training zones in bpm — endurance to VO2 max.

calculators.title: Period Calculator
calculators.description: Next period start, ovulation day, and fertile window from your last period and cycle length.

calculators.title: Cubic Yard Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards of concrete, mulch, or topsoil from L × W × D. Rectangle or circle.

calculators.title: Percent Off Calculator
calculators.description: Sale price after a percent-off discount, plus the dollars saved and the percent paid.

calculators.title: Discount Calculator
calculators.description: Final price after one or two stacked discounts. Percent off and dollar off supported.

calculators.title: High School GPA Calculator
calculators.description: Letter grades + credit hours to a 4.0 GPA. Honors/AP/IB weighted boost optional.

calculators.title: Square Root Calculator
calculators.description: Square root with 10-digit precision and simplified radical form (e.g. 5√2).

calculators.title: Long Division Calculator
calculators.description: Quotient and remainder with the full step-by-step long-division view.

calculators.title: Factor Calculator
calculators.description: Every factor and the prime factorization of any positive integer. Flags primes and perfect squares.

calculators.title: Protein Intake Calculator
calculators.description: Daily protein grams from body weight, activity level, and goal (cut, maintain, bulk).

calculators.title: Scientific Notation Calculator
calculators.description: Convert numbers to scientific notation a × 10ⁿ and back. Engineering notation supported.

calculators.title: P-Value Calculator
calculators.description: Z-score to one- or two-tailed p-value. Plain-English interpretation of significance.

calculators.title: Stock Profit Calculator
calculators.description: Profit, return percent, and breakeven price on a stock trade. Optional buy/sell fees.

calculators.title: Capital Gains Tax Calculator
calculators.description: Federal capital-gains tax on a sale. Short-term vs long-term brackets, NIIT included.

calculators.title: Gravel Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards and US tons of gravel for a driveway, walkway, or base. Density override.

calculators.title: Derivative Calculator
calculators.description: Take the derivative of polynomials, exponentials, logs, sin/cos. Step-by-step rules.

calculators.title: Integral Calculator
calculators.description: Antiderivative for polynomials, exponentials, basic trig. Definite and indefinite.

calculators.title: Limit Calculator
calculators.description: Limits of polynomials, rationals, trig as x approaches a value or infinity.

calculators.title: Division Calculator
calculators.description: Integer and decimal division with quotient, remainder, and recurring digits.

calculators.title: Simplify Calculator
calculators.description: Simplify algebraic expressions, combine like terms, distribute, reduce fractions.

calculators.title: RREF Calculator
calculators.description: Row-reduce any matrix to reduced row echelon form. Step-by-step Gauss-Jordan.

calculators.title: GCF Calculator
calculators.description: Greatest common factor of any number set. Euclidean algorithm shown.

calculators.title: Surface Area Calculator
calculators.description: Surface area of cube, sphere, cylinder, cone, pyramid, rectangular prism.

calculators.title: Arc Length Calculator
calculators.description: Length of a circular arc from radius and angle (degrees or radians).

calculators.title: Trigonometry Calculator
calculators.description: sin, cos, tan, and inverses. Degrees or radians, right triangle solver.

calculators.title: Pythagorean Theorem Calculator
calculators.description: Solve a^2 + b^2 = c^2 for any missing side of a right triangle.

calculators.title: Percent Error Calculator
calculators.description: Percent error from experimental and theoretical values. Standard physics formula.

calculators.title: Percent Decrease Calculator
calculators.description: Percent decrease (or increase) between two numbers. Shows absolute change too.

calculators.title: Circumference Calculator
calculators.description: Circumference and area of a circle from radius, diameter, or area.

calculators.title: Volume Calculator
calculators.description: Volume of cube, sphere, cylinder, cone, pyramid, rectangular prism.

calculators.title: Angle Calculator
calculators.description: Triangle angles and sides via law of sines / law of cosines. Right-triangle mode.

calculators.title: Linear Equation Calculator
calculators.description: Solve y = mx + b from two points or slope-intercept. Graphs the line.

calculators.title: Interpolation Calculator
calculators.description: Linear interpolation between two points. Solve for y at any x.

calculators.title: Z-Score Calculator
calculators.description: Z-score from a raw value, mean, and standard deviation. Plus z-to-probability.

calculators.title: Linear Regression Calculator
calculators.description: Best-fit line from x,y data — slope, intercept, R-squared, residuals.

calculators.title: Balancing Equations Calculator
calculators.description: Balance any chemical equation. Mass and charge conservation, smallest integer coefficients.

calculators.title: Ohms Law Calculator
calculators.description: V = IR. Solve for voltage, current, resistance, or power from any two values.

calculators.title: Dilution Calculator
calculators.description: M1V1 = M2V2 for solution dilution. Stock concentration, target concentration, target volume.

calculators.title: Gold Calculator
calculators.description: Value of gold by weight and purity (10k, 14k, 18k, 22k, 24k). Live spot price input.

calculators.title: Gross Margin Calculator
calculators.description: Gross margin and markup from cost and selling price, or work back from a target margin.

calculators.title: Time Value of Money Calculator
calculators.description: Present value, future value, payment, rate, or periods. Standard TVM equation.

calculators.title: IRA Calculator
calculators.description: Traditional and Roth IRA growth. Annual contribution, expected return, retirement age.

calculators.title: Savings Bond Calculator
calculators.description: EE and I bond value at maturity. Treasury rates, compounding semi-annual.

calculators.title: Pay Raise Calculator
calculators.description: Net pay change after a raise. Bracket, deductions, and effective rate adjusted.

calculators.title: CPM Calculator
calculators.description: Cost per mille (1000 impressions) for ad spend. Reverse-solve impressions or budget.

calculators.title: Home Insurance Calculator
calculators.description: Premium estimate from dwelling coverage, deductible, location risk, and credit tier.

calculators.title: Prorated Rent Calculator
calculators.description: Prorated rent for a partial month — by days, weeks, or banker month.

calculators.title: Overtime Calculator
calculators.description: FLSA overtime — base hours, OT hours, time-and-a-half or double-time.

calculators.title: 1099 Tax Calculator
calculators.description: Self-employment tax + federal income tax estimate for 1099 contractors. Quarterly estimates.

calculators.title: AGI Calculator
calculators.description: Adjusted gross income from gross income and above-the-line deductions per IRS Form 1040.

calculators.title: Body Shape Calculator
calculators.description: Body shape (hourglass, pear, apple, rectangle, inverted triangle) from bust, waist, hips.

calculators.title: Target Heart Rate Calculator
calculators.description: Target HR zones via Karvonen and percent of max. Resting HR refinement.

calculators.title: Army Body Fat Calculator
calculators.description: Body fat per AR 600-9 tape test. Height + neck + waist (+ hip for women).

calculators.title: Water Intake Calculator
calculators.description: Daily water in oz/L from body weight, activity, and climate.

calculators.title: ABV Calculator
calculators.description: Alcohol by volume from original and final gravity. Brewing standard.

calculators.title: RVU Calculator
calculators.description: Medicare RVU to dollars. Work, PE, MP RVUs and the conversion factor.

calculators.title: Mulch Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards and bags of mulch from L x W x depth. Hardwood, cypress, rubber densities.

calculators.title: Board Foot Calculator
calculators.description: Board feet from thickness, width, length, and quantity. Hardwood lumber standard.

calculators.title: Stone Calculator
calculators.description: Cubic yards and US tons of stone for a driveway or wall. Density override.

calculators.title: Stair Calculator
calculators.description: Stringer length, riser height, tread depth from total rise. IRC code limits flagged.

calculators.title: BTU Calculator
calculators.description: Heating and cooling BTU/h for a room from square footage, insulation, sun exposure.

calculators.title: AP Score Calculator
calculators.description: AP exam composite score from MCQ and FRQ raw scores. 1-5 scale per College Board.

calculators.title: SAT Score Calculator
calculators.description: SAT composite from EBRW and Math raw scores. College Board scaled-score lookup.

calculators.title: Semester Grade Calculator
calculators.description: Final semester grade from term grades and exam weight. Target-grade solver.

calculators.title: Puppy Weight Calculator
calculators.description: Adult weight prediction from puppy age + current weight. Small/medium/large/giant.
